title: Autonomous Loop Registry Schema
description: Machine-level registry tracking all active loops on a system. Version 1: baseline schema with all required fields.

loop_id.description: Primary key: 12-character hexadecimal ID derived from sha256(realpath(contract_path))

contract_path.description: Absolute realpath-resolved path to the LOOP_CONTRACT.md file

state_dir.description: Absolute path to loop state directory (typically <repo>/.loop-state/<loop_id>/)

owner_session_id.description: Claude session ID of the current owner

owner_pid.description: Process ID of the current owner

owner_start_time_us.description: Process start time in microseconds since Unix epoch (PID-reuse defense)

started_at_us.description: When the current owner acquired the loop lock (microseconds since Unix epoch)

expected_cadence_seconds.description: Expected interval between heartbeat updates (in seconds)

generation.description: Monotonic counter incremented on each reclaim (TOCTOU defense)

campaign_slug.description: Optional v2 field: kebab-case slug derived from the contract's `name:` frontmatter. When present together with short_hash, the human-readable display name is `AL-<campaign_slug>--<short_hash>`. Used by /autoloop:reclaim and /autoloop:muster to accept identifier forms beyond the bare loop_id.

short_hash.description: Optional v2 field: 6-char hex disambiguator for campaigns sharing a slug. Computed as sha256(creator_session_id + ':' + created_at_utc + ':' + legacy_loop_id)[:6].

project_cwd.description: Optional v2 field: realpath of the project root that owns this campaign (where the .autoloop/ subdir lives).

migrated_from.description: Optional v2 field: previous loop_id when migrate_legacy_contract created a new entry from a legacy LOOP_CONTRACT.md.

migrated_to.description: Optional v2 field: new loop_id when this entry was superseded by migrate_legacy_contract.

status.description: Optional v2 field: lifecycle status. Doctor uses this to detect zombie loops marked DONE in the contract but still loaded.

schema_version.description: Registry schema version (currently 1; code must reject > 1)
